summary: Financial Mapping Fix Verified - All backend tests passed (10/10). Frontend label changes from 'Contract Value' to 'Sign-off Value' verified and fixed remaining instances in ProjectFinanceDetail.jsx.
passed_tests: test_01_login_works - Authentication working with founder credentials
test_04_get_project_finance_detail_returns_value_lifecycle - GET /api/finance/project-finance/{project_id} returns value lifecycle in summary
test_01_search_filter_works - Search filter on project finance list works
test_02_all_projects_have_value_lifecycle - All projects have complete value lifecycle fields
critical_code_review_comments: Other pages (ProjectProfitabilityReport.jsx, MilestonePaymentConfirmations.jsx, Receipts.jsx, Refunds.jsx) still have 'Contract Value' labels - may need to be updated for consistency if required
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test project proj_4aaba062
context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial mapping fix verified. Key changes: 1) Backend returns presales_budget, booked_value, signoff_value as distinct fields, 2) signoff_value is used for profit calculations, 3) contract_value is returned for backward compatibility (equals signoff_value), 4) Frontend shows 'Sign-off Value' label in Project Finance pages. Test file: test_financial_mapping_fix.py

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Contract Value was incorrectly pulling presales_budget instead of the locked BOQ value (signoff_value) from Design Sign-off
rca_of_the_issue.impact: Financial reports showed incorrect revenue baseline for profit calculations
rca_of_the_issue.fix: 1) Backend now returns three distinct value lifecycle fields: presales_budget (Lead/Presales estimate), booked_value (Booking/Agreement), signoff_value (Final BOQ from Design Sign-off). 2) signoff_value is used as the primary revenue baseline for profit calculations. 3) Frontend label renamed from 'Contract Value' to 'Sign-off Value'
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 10 backend tests pass. Frontend shows 'Sign-off Value' label correctly in Project Finance list and detail pages.
